name: Spellbook of Miracles
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>導</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>書</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>奇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>跡</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 Spellcaster-Type Xyz Monster in your Graveyard and up to 2 of your banished "Spellbook" Spell Cards; Special Summon that monster, and if you do, attach the targeted "Spellbook" Spell Card(s) to it as Xyz Material. You can only activate 1 "Spellbook of Miracles" per turn.
eff: Target 1 Spellcaster-Type Xyz Monster in your Graveyard and up to 2 of your banished "Spellbook" Spell Cards; Special Summon that monster, and if you do, attach the targeted "Spellbook" Spell Card(s) to it as Xyz Material. You can only activate 1 "Spellbook of Miracles" per turn.
